title: Agent Control Specification intervention point result envelope (AGT D1/D2)
description: JSON result envelope returned by native wire bindings after evaluating one intervention point. AGT D1 carries an embedded transform-shaped verdict (no upstream effects[] array); AGT D1.4 surfaces input_identity and enforced_identity alongside the backwards-compatible action_identity alias. Unlike the policy-output verdict, the embedded verdict MAY carry reserved runtime_error: reasons for fail-closed runtime failures.

transformed_policy_target_applied.description: True when the returned transformed policy target has been applied for the evaluated mode and verdict. The native runtime sets it from transformed_policy_target.is_some().

action_identity.description: AGT D1.4: backwards-compatible alias for enforced_identity.

input_identity.description: AGT D1.4: identity of the policy target as supplied to the intervention point.

enforced_identity.description: AGT D1.4: identity of the policy target after any transform was applied for the evaluated mode.

result_verdict.description: Verdict embedded in a result envelope. Matches the AGT D1/D2 policy-output verdict but, because it also represents fail-closed runtime failures, the reason MAY use the reserved runtime_error: prefix.

reason.description: Policy or runtime reason. Result envelopes MAY carry reserved runtime_error: reasons for fail-closed runtime failures.

transform.description: AGT D1.1: present only when decision == transform.

evidence.description: AGT D2: optional opaque evidence object carried by high-assurance dispatchers.

allOf.description: AGT D1.1: transform body is REQUIRED iff decision == transform.

else.description: Transform body is FORBIDDEN on non-transform decisions.

allOf.description: AGT D1: the legacy effects[] member on the verdict is REJECTED.

path.description: Path rooted at $policy_target. Other roots fail closed with runtime_error:transform_target_forbidden.

artefact.description: Content address or URI of an offline-verifiable proof. SHOULD be sha256:<lowercase-hex> or a URI.

verification_pointers.description: Map of short identifiers to URIs an auditor MAY consult.
